modules.name: RunData
modules.responsibility: Define the RunRecord and StatusConfig TypeScript types, export an array of exactly 7 hardcoded RunRecord objects via getRunRecords, and export the STATUS_CONFIG map via getStatusConfig that resolves each status key to its display color and uppercase label.

modules.name: HistoryTable
modules.responsibility: A 'use client' React component that fetches run data from GET /api/runs on mount using useEffect and useState. Renders a scrollable table with columns STATUS, FEATURE, RUN ID, REACHED, WHEN and one row per RunSummary when the response array is non-empty. Renders the exact text 'No runs found.' when the response array is empty. Does not depend on RunData; any status-display configuration is inlined.

modules.name: AppHeader
modules.responsibility: Render the fixed 50px header containing the green logo dot, bold CODEFORGE label, Run and History tab buttons, and the call-budget progress bar. Accepts activeTab and onTabChange as props to drive tab button active states.

modules.name: RunPlaceholder
modules.responsibility: Render the placeholder div displayed when the Run tab is active. No props required.

modules.name: DashboardPage
modules.responsibility: Root Next.js page. Owns the activeTab useState. Composes AppHeader (passing tab state and handler), and conditionally renders HistoryTable (History tab active) or RunPlaceholder (Run tab active). Applies global font and body styles via the root layout.

returns.description: Array of exactly 7 hardcoded RunRecord objects.
Map from status key string to an object with display color (oklch string) and uppercase label string.

Renders a scrollable history table with column headers STATUS, FEATURE, RUN ID, REACHED, WHEN and one row per RunSummary when fetch('/api/runs') resolves with a non-empty array; renders the exact text 'No runs found.' and no table rows when the array is empty.

fetch_behaviour.trigger: useEffect with empty dependency array — fires exactly once on component mount
fetch_behaviour.call_count: exactly one fetch('/api/runs') call per mount
fetch_behaviour.non_empty_path: Renders a table with column headers STATUS, FEATURE, RUN ID, REACHED, WHEN and one row per RunSummary object; row data sourced exclusively from the fetch response — getRunRecords() is not called
fetch_behaviour.empty_path: Renders the string 'No runs found.' and no table rows
fetch_behaviour.loading_state: No loading indicator required; no testable constraint on render during pending state
fetch_behaviour.error_handling: Out of scope — network errors are not handled by this component

contract.signature: AppHeader({ activeTab, onTabChange, callCurrent, callCeiling }: AppHeaderProps) => JSX.Element

parameters.name: onTabChange
parameters.description: Callback fired when a tab button is clicked.

returns.description: Fixed 50px header with green logo dot, bold CODEFORGE label, tab buttons, and call-budget progress bar.
Placeholder div displayed when the Run tab is active. No props required.

data_flow.name: FetchRunSummaries
data_flow.data_description: On mount, HistoryTable fires fetch('/api/runs') exactly once via useEffect. The response is a RunSummary array; if non-empty each element maps to one table row; if empty the component renders the text 'No runs found.'.

data_flow.name: TabStateToHeader
data_flow.data_description: activeTab string ('run' | 'history'), onTabChange callback, callCurrent (hardcoded e.g. 12), and callCeiling (hardcoded e.g. 50) are passed as props.

data_flow.name: TabChangeToPage
data_flow.data_description: onTabChange callback fires with the clicked tab key, triggering a useState update in DashboardPage that re-renders the active view.

data_flow.name: ConditionalHistoryRender
data_flow.data_description: DashboardPage renders HistoryTable only when activeTab === 'history'. No props passed; HistoryTable sources its own data via fetch('/api/runs').

data_flow.name: ConditionalRunRender
data_flow.data_description: DashboardPage renders RunPlaceholder only when activeTab === 'run'. No props passed.
